task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: The regex should correctly capture three groups: ISO 8601 timestamp, log level (INFO/ERROR/WARN/DEBUG), and the remaining message text. It should handle varying message lengths and special characters.

task: Create a Python function that validates if an AWS S3 bucket name follows AWS naming conventions (3-63 characters, lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens, must start and end with alphanumeric)
solution_criteria: Function should return a boolean, accept a string parameter, and correctly validate all S3 naming rules. Should reject invalid names and accept valid names.

task: Generate a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that specifies runtime as Python 3.11, memory as 256MB, timeout as 30 seconds, and environment variables for API_KEY and DATABASE_URL
solution_criteria: JSON should be valid and properly structured with all specified Lambda configuration properties. Should include proper nesting for environment variables and correct value types.
